commands.name: run
commands.description: Run a command or script

options.name: --extra
options.description: Include optional dependencies from the specified extra name

options.name: --all-extras
options.description: Include all optional dependencies

options.name: --no-extra
options.description: Exclude the specified optional dependencies, if `--all-extras` is supplied

options.name: --no-dev
options.description: Disable the development dependency group [env: UV_NO_DEV=]

options.name: --group
options.description: Include dependencies from the specified dependency group

options.name: --no-group
options.description: Disable the specified dependency group [env: UV_NO_GROUP=]

options.name: --no-default-groups
options.description: Ignore the default dependency groups [env: UV_NO_DEFAULT_GROUPS=]

options.name: --only-group
options.description: Only include dependencies from the specified dependency group

options.name: --all-groups
options.description: Include dependencies from all dependency groups

options.name: --module
options.description: Run a Python module

options.name: --only-dev
options.description: Only include the development dependency group

options.name: --no-editable
options.description:
Install any editable dependencies, including the project and any workspace members, as
non-editable [env: UV_NO_EDITABLE=]

options.name: --exact
options.description: Perform an exact sync, removing extraneous packages

options.name: --env-file
options.description: Load environment variables from a `.env` file [env: UV_ENV_FILE=]

options.name: --no-env-file
options.description: Avoid reading environment variables from a `.env` file [env: UV_NO_ENV_FILE=]

options.name: --with
options.description: Run with the given packages installed

options.name: --with-editable
options.description: Run with the given packages installed in editable mode

options.name: --with-requirements
options.description: Run with the packages listed in the given files

options.name: --isolated
options.description: Run the command in an isolated virtual environment [env: UV_ISOLATED=]

options.name: --active
options.description: Prefer the active virtual environment over the project's virtual environment

options.name: --no-sync
options.description: Avoid syncing the virtual environment [env: UV_NO_SYNC=]

options.name: --locked
options.description: Assert that the `uv.lock` will remain unchanged [env: UV_LOCKED=]

options.name: --frozen
options.description: Run without updating the `uv.lock` file [env: UV_FROZEN=]

options.name: --script
options.description: Run the given path as a Python script

options.name: --gui-script
options.description: Run the given path as a Python GUI script

options.name: --all-packages
options.description: Run the command with all workspace members installed

options.name: --package
options.description: Run the command in a specific package in the workspace

options.name: --no-project
options.description: Avoid discovering the project or workspace

options.name: --python-platform
options.description:
The platform for which requirements should be installed [possible values: windows, linux,
macos, x86_64-pc-windows-msvc, aarch64-pc-windows-msvc, i686-pc-windows-msvc,
x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu, aarch64-apple-darwin, x86_64-apple-darwin,
aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu, aarch64-unknown-linux-musl, x86_64-unknown-linux-musl,
riscv64-unknown-linux, x86_64-manylinux2014, x86_64-manylinux_2_17, x86_64-manylinux_2_28,
x86_64-manylinux_2_31, x86_64-manylinux_2_32, x86_64-manylinux_2_33,
x86_64-manylinux_2_34, x86_64-manylinux_2_35, x86_64-manylinux_2_36,
x86_64-manylinux_2_37, x86_64-manylinux_2_38, x86_64-manylinux_2_39,
x86_64-manylinux_2_40, aarch64-manylinux2014, aarch64-manylinux_2_17,
aarch64-manylinux_2_28, aarch64-manylinux_2_31, aarch64-manylinux_2_32,
aarch64-manylinux_2_33, aarch64-manylinux_2_34, aarch64-manylinux_2_35,
aarch64-manylinux_2_36, aarch64-manylinux_2_37, aarch64-manylinux_2_38,
aarch64-manylinux_2_39, aarch64-manylinux_2_40, aarch64-linux-android,
x86_64-linux-android, wasm32-pyodide2024, arm64-apple-ios, arm64-apple-ios-simulator,
x86_64-apple-ios-simulator]
Index options:

options.name: --index
options.description:
The URLs to use when resolving dependencies, in addition to the default index [env:
UV_INDEX=]

options.name: --default-index
options.description:
The URL of the default package index (by default: <https://pypi.org/simple>) [env:
UV_DEFAULT_INDEX=]

options.name: --index-url
options.description:
(Deprecated: use `--default-index` instead) The URL of the Python package index (by
default: <https://pypi.org/simple>) [env: UV_INDEX_URL=]

options.name: --extra-index-url
options.description:
(Deprecated: use `--index` instead) Extra URLs of package indexes to use, in addition to
`--index-url` [env: UV_EXTRA_INDEX_URL=]

options.name: --find-links
options.description:
Locations to search for candidate distributions, in addition to those found in the
registry indexes [env: UV_FIND_LINKS=]

options.name: --no-index
options.description:
Ignore the registry index (e.g., PyPI), instead relying on direct URL dependencies and
those provided via `--find-links`

options.name: --index-strategy
options.description:
The strategy to use when resolving against multiple index URLs [env: UV_INDEX_STRATEGY=]
[possible values: first-index, unsafe-first-match, unsafe-best-match]

options.name: --keyring-provider
options.description:
Attempt to use `keyring` for authentication for index URLs [env: UV_KEYRING_PROVIDER=]
[possible values: disabled, subprocess]
Resolver options:

options.name: --upgrade
options.description:
Allow package upgrades, ignoring pinned versions in any existing output file. Implies
`--refresh`

options.name: --upgrade-package
options.description:
Allow upgrades for a specific package, ignoring pinned versions in any existing output
file. Implies `--refresh-package`

options.name: --resolution
--prerelease
options.description:
The strategy to use when considering pre-release versions [env: UV_PRERELEASE=] [possible
values: disallow, allow, if-necessary, explicit, if-necessary-or-explicit]

options.name: --fork-strategy
options.description:
The strategy to use when selecting multiple versions of a given package across Python
versions and platforms [env: UV_FORK_STRATEGY=] [possible values: fewest, requires-python]

options.name: --exclude-newer
options.description:
Limit candidate packages to those that were uploaded prior to the given date [env:
UV_EXCLUDE_NEWER=]

options.name: --exclude-newer-package
options.description:
Limit candidate packages for specific packages to those that were uploaded prior to the
given date

options.name: --no-sources
options.description:
Ignore the `tool.uv.sources` table when resolving dependencies. Used to lock against the
standards-compliant, publishable package metadata, as opposed to using any workspace, Git,
URL, or local path sources [env: UV_NO_SOURCES=]
Installer options:

options.name: --reinstall
options.description:
Reinstall all packages, regardless of whether they're already installed. Implies
`--refresh`

options.name: --reinstall-package
options.description:
Reinstall a specific package, regardless of whether it's already installed. Implies
`--refresh-package`

options.name: --link-mode
options.description:
The method to use when installing packages from the global cache [env: UV_LINK_MODE=]
[possible values: clone, copy, hardlink, symlink]

options.name: --compile-bytecode
options.description:
Compile Python files to bytecode after installation [env: UV_COMPILE_BYTECODE=]
Build options:

options.name: --config-setting
options.description: Settings to pass to the PEP 517 build backend, specified as `KEY=VALUE` pairs

options.name: --config-settings-package
options.description:
Settings to pass to the PEP 517 build backend for a specific package, specified as
`PACKAGE:KEY=VALUE` pairs

options.name: --no-build-isolation
options.description: Disable isolation when building source distributions [env: UV_NO_BUILD_ISOLATION=]

options.name: --no-build-isolation-package
options.description: Disable isolation when building source distributions for a specific package

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build source distributions [env: UV_NO_BUILD=]

options.name: --no-build-package
options.description: Don't build source distributions for a specific package [env: UV_NO_BUILD_PACKAGE=]

options.name: --no-binary
options.description: Don't install pre-built wheels [env: UV_NO_BINARY=]

options.name: --no-binary-package
options.description:
Don't install pre-built wheels for a specific package [env: UV_NO_BINARY_PACKAGE=]
Cache options:

options.name: --no-cache
options.description:
Avoid reading from or writing to the cache, instead using a temporary directory for the
duration of the operation [env: UV_NO_CACHE=]

options.name: --cache-dir
options.description: Path to the cache directory [env: UV_CACHE_DIR=]

options.name: --refresh
options.description: Refresh all cached data

options.name: --refresh-package
options.description:
Refresh cached data for a specific package

options.name: --python
options.description:
The Python interpreter to use for the run environment. [env:
UV_PYTHON=]

options.name: --managed-python
options.description: Require use of uv-managed Python versions [env: UV_MANAGED_PYTHON=]

options.description: Disable use of uv-managed Python versions [env: UV_NO_MANAGED_PYTHON=]

options.name: --no-python-downloads
options.description:

"UV_PYTHON_DOWNLOADS=never"]

options.description: Use quiet output

Resolver options:

options.name: --resolution
--prerelease
options.description:
The strategy to use when considering pre-release versions [env: UV_PRERELEASE=] [possible
values: disallow, allow, if-necessary, explicit, if-necessary-or-explicit]

options.name: --fork-strategy
options.description:
The strategy to use when selecting multiple versions of a given package across Python
versions and platforms [env: UV_FORK_STRATEGY=] [possible values: fewest, requires-python]

options.name: --exclude-newer
options.description:
Limit candidate packages to those that were uploaded prior to the given date [env:
UV_EXCLUDE_NEWER=]

options.name: --exclude-newer-package
options.description:
Limit candidate packages for specific packages to those that were uploaded prior to the
given date

options.name: --no-sources
options.description:
Ignore the `tool.uv.sources` table when resolving dependencies. Used to lock against the
standards-compliant, publishable package metadata, as opposed to using any workspace, Git,
URL, or local path sources [env: UV_NO_SOURCES=]
Index options:

options.name: --index
options.description:
The URLs to use when resolving dependencies, in addition to the default index [env:
UV_INDEX=]

options.name: --default-index
options.description:
The URL of the default package index (by default: <https://pypi.org/simple>) [env:
UV_DEFAULT_INDEX=]

options.name: --index-url
options.description:
(Deprecated: use `--default-index` instead) The URL of the Python package index (by
default: <https://pypi.org/simple>) [env: UV_INDEX_URL=]

options.name: --extra-index-url
options.description:
(Deprecated: use `--index` instead) Extra URLs of package indexes to use, in addition to
`--index-url` [env: UV_EXTRA_INDEX_URL=]

options.name: --find-links
options.description:
Locations to search for candidate distributions, in addition to those found in the
registry indexes [env: UV_FIND_LINKS=]

options.name: --no-index
options.description:
Ignore the registry index (e.g., PyPI), instead relying on direct URL dependencies and
those provided via `--find-links`

options.name: --index-strategy
options.description:
The strategy to use when resolving against multiple index URLs [env: UV_INDEX_STRATEGY=]
[possible values: first-index, unsafe-first-match, unsafe-best-match]

options.name: --keyring-provider
options.description:
Attempt to use `keyring` for authentication for index URLs [env: UV_KEYRING_PROVIDER=]
[possible values: disabled, subprocess]
